name: Aphex Twin
bio: Aphex Twin has a durable catalog that continues to attract listeners through streaming, playlists, and long-tail discovery.
notable_for: Aphex Twin remains closely associated with Windowlicker and Avril 14th, which continue to anchor catalog attention.
career_highlight: Songs like Windowlicker and Avril 14th still help define the catalog's long-tail earnings profile.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming sustains earnings even after the original release cycle ends.
Playlist use and listener rediscovery keep durable songs in circulation.
Licensing and long-tail audience demand help extend catalog value over time.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Aphex Twin's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Aphex Twin's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
